requirement_topic.en: Horizontal Battery Regulation — Sri Lanka has no EU-style battery law
requirement_topic.zh: 横向电池法规——斯里兰卡无欧盟式电池法
requirement_topic.zht: 橫向電池法規——斯里蘭卡無歐盟式電池法

summary.en: Sri Lanka does not operate an EU-style horizontal battery regulation. There is no national equivalent of EU Regulation 2023/1542 mandating a battery passport, carbon-footprint declaration, recycled-content thresholds, or extended-producer-responsibility (EPR) registration for portable lithium batteries. Market control instead runs through SLSI product conformity and the SLS mark where a battery or appliance falls within a regulated/import-inspection scope, plus general consumer-protection and import-control rules administered with Sri Lanka Customs at the Port of Colombo. Environmental obligations on waste batteries are handled under general Central Environmental Authority waste rules rather than a dedicated battery-producer-responsibility scheme.
summary.zh: 斯里兰卡未实施欧盟式横向电池法规。无对应EU法规2023/1542的国家立法，不强制要求便携式锂电池提供电池护照、碳足迹声明、再生材料含量门槛或延伸生产者责任（EPR）登记。市场管控改由SLSI产品合格评定及SLS标志承担（当电池或电器属于受监管/进口检验范围时），并配合一般消费者保护与进口管制规则，由斯里兰卡海关在科伦坡港执行。废电池的环境义务由中央环境局一般废弃物规则处理，而非专门的电池生产者责任制度。
summary.zht: 斯里蘭卡未實施歐盟式橫向電池法規。無對應EU法規2023/1542的國家立法，不強制要求便攜式鋰電池提供電池護照、碳足跡聲明、再生材料含量門檻或延伸生產者責任（EPR）登記。市場管控改由SLSI產品合格評定及SLS標誌承擔（當電池或電器屬於受監管/進口檢驗範圍時），並配合一般消費者保護與進口管制規則，由斯里蘭卡海關在科倫坡港執行。廢電池的環境義務由中央環境局一般廢棄物規則處理，而非專門的電池生產者責任制度。

standards_or_laws: Sri Lanka Standards Institution Act No. 6 of 1984 (SLSI conformity and SLS mark framework)
Imports and Exports (Control) Act and related import-control regulations administered by Sri Lanka Customs
National Environmental Act and Central Environmental Authority waste-management rules (general, not battery-specific)

summary.en: China likewise has no single horizontal battery passport/EPR law equivalent to EU 2023/1542 for portable lithium batteries; domestic control is product-safety led through GB 31241-2022 and, for in-scope products, CCC certification, with separate environmental and recycling rules under SAMR and the Ministry of Ecology and Environment frameworks. Chinese GB/GB-T documentation therefore addresses product safety rather than a unified battery-lifecycle regulation.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有对应EU 2023/1542的便携式锂电池横向电池护照/EPR单一立法；国内管控以产品安全为主，通过GB 31241-2022进行，对受监管产品适用CCC认证，环境与回收另有SAMR及生态环境部框架下的规则。因此中国GB/GB-T文件解决的是产品安全，而非统一的电池全生命周期法规。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有對應EU 2023/1542的便攜式鋰電池橫向電池護照/EPR單一立法；國內管控以產品安全為主，通過GB 31241-2022進行，對受監管產品適用CCC認證，環境與回收另有SAMR及生態環境部框架下的規則。因此中國GB/GB-T文件解決的是產品安全，而非統一的電池全生命週期法規。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) where the end product is in the CCC catalogue

gap.en: Because Sri Lanka has no EU-style horizontal battery regulation, exporters do not face battery-passport, carbon-footprint, recycled-content, or per-market EPR registration duties that the EU imposes. The practical gap is the reverse of the EU case: compliance effort concentrates on SLSI product conformity / SLS mark (where in scope), safety and EMC evidence, transport documentation, and a registered local importer, rather than on lifecycle/environmental filings. Exporters should confirm the current SLSI regulated-product list and import-inspection scope for their specific battery or appliance before shipment.
gap.zh: 由于斯里兰卡没有欧盟式横向电池法规，出口商无需承担欧盟所要求的电池护照、碳足迹、再生材料含量或逐市场EPR登记义务。实际差距与欧盟情形相反：合规工作集中于SLSI产品合格评定/SLS标志（属于范围时）、安全与电磁兼容证据、运输文件及注册当地进口商，而非生命周期/环境申报。出口商应在发货前确认其具体电池或电器适用的最新SLSI受监管产品清单及进口检验范围。
gap.zht: 由於斯里蘭卡沒有歐盟式橫向電池法規，出口商無需承擔歐盟所要求的電池護照、碳足跡、再生材料含量或逐市場EPR登記義務。實際差距與歐盟情形相反：合規工作集中於SLSI產品合格評定/SLS標誌（屬於範圍時）、安全與電磁兼容證據、運輸文件及註冊當地進口商，而非生命週期/環境申報。出口商應在發貨前確認其具體電池或電器適用的最新SLSI受監管產品清單及進口檢驗範圍。

mandatory_status.target: No EU-style horizontal battery regulation in Sri Lanka — control is via SLSI conformity/SLS mark where in scope plus import-control and general environmental rules; no battery passport or EPR registration mandated
mandatory_status.cn: No single horizontal battery law — domestic control via GB 31241-2022 product safety and CCC where applicable

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Sri Lanka does not impose an EU-style battery passport, EPR, or recycled-content regime on portable lithium batteries. Exporters should focus on SLSI product conformity and the SLS mark where the product is within a regulated or import-inspection scope, and confirm the current scope with SLSI rather than assume a horizontal battery law applies.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 斯里兰卡未对便携式锂电池施加欧盟式电池护照、EPR或再生材料含量制度。出口商应在产品属于受监管或进口检验范围时聚焦SLSI产品合格评定及SLS标志，并向SLSI确认最新范围，而非假定存在横向电池法。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 斯里蘭卡未對便攜式鋰電池施加歐盟式電池護照、EPR或再生材料含量制度。出口商應在產品屬於受監管或進口檢驗範圍時聚焦SLSI產品合格評定及SLS標誌，並向SLSI確認最新範圍，而非假定存在橫向電池法。
